name: PRO DEX INC
summary: Company Overview Pro-Dex, Inc. (Company, Pro-Dex, we, our, us) specializes in the design, development, and manufacture of autoclavable, battery-powered and electric, multi-function surgical drivers and shavers used primarily in the orthopedic, thoracic, and craniomaxillofacial (CMF) markets.We have patented adaptive torque-limiting technology and proprietary sealing solutions which appeal to our customers, primarily medical device distributors.
